grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: Clearly cites HB 5.14.1 for leasehold and HB 5.5.1-5.5.2 for building regulations

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Explicitly discusses Part 2 requirements and provides specific examples from Halifax, Barclays, Nationwide, and Santander

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: Clearly states 4 years for building regulations enforcement and mentions 10 years for planning breaches

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: Discusses 'lack of building regulations approval indemnity insurance' as a common solution with reference to HB 9

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: Provides specific handbook references, section numbers, and detailed guidance rather than generic conveyancing advice
